name_en: Top Quality Original【Exclusive Photo M12664 Green 】This card case features a slim silhouette constructed from Monogram Heritage canvas, easily fitting into pockets or handbags. The flap is secured by a hidden snap button, revealing a fan-fold compartment and card slots. Calfskin lining and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo inspired by Damier canvas add refined details. 8 x 1 x 10.5 cm (H x W x L)
